issues.description: Trigger should be 'OnAttack' (when this character attacks), not 'Activated' (manual ability)
Action type 'TrashFromHand' is incorrect. Effect says 'trash 2 cards from the top of your deck', not hand. Should be a deck trash action (likely 'TrashFromDeck' or similar mill effect)
KO target should allow 'up to 1' selection (optional), but current DSL lacks 'optional' flag on the KO action
Rest action should be optional ('You may rest'), but current DSL does not mark it as optional
